LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD BETWEEN PETITIONER AND RESPONDENT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.)
